setup-worktree: for d in .agents .claude .codex .cursor; do [ -d "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/$d" ] && mkdir -p "$d" && rsync -a --exclude worktrees --exclude scheduled_tasks.lock "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/$d/." "$d/"; done
for f in .env .env.local .env.development .env.production; do [ -f "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/$f" ] && cp "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/$f" "$f" || true; done
